A0153.title: Virtual Land Trading Platform Review Mechanism
A0153.definition: Establishing a platform review and user reporting mechanism to identify and delist fraudulent virtual assets.
A0153.description: Platform governance: project review and admission; abnormal transaction monitoring; user rating system; fraud reporting channel; blacklist mechanism; dispute arbitration; fund custody.
A0153.limitation: Centralized review may be unfair; cannot cover all fraud; cross-platform regulation is difficult.
keywords: Virtual Land Trading Platform Review Mechanism
